description: A citizen is buying a property and wants to check if there are any outstanding government liens (e.g., for unpaid taxes or water bills).

nodes.task_description: Gather the property address or parcel number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the identifier for the property.

nodes.task_description: Search across multiple systems (tax, utilities) for any outstanding liens on the property.

expected_outcome.value: Agent searches and finds an outstanding lien for an unpaid water bill.

nodes.task_description: Provide the details of any found liens to the citizen.

expected_outcome.value: Agent informs the citizen about the water bill lien and the amount owed.
